team_name: TenderAI: Intelligent Tender Evaluation & Eligibility Analysis System
summary: Design a technical platform for intelligent tender evaluation and eligibility analysis using AI, automating the entire pipeline for procurement teams.
optimization_claims: Turning days of expert review into structured, minutes-long analysis.
Consistent risk flagging without reading every clause.
Data-backed Go/No-Go decisions instead of gut-feel.
constraints_addressed: High stakes for getting it wrong
